title: AAYS deep watchdog recovery V2
scope: Long read-only stdout-only watchdog retry. No database writes. No destructive file operations. Fixes prior job-scope helper failure.
expected_outputs: candidate scan lines for parcelsales, fgc, cloud, oracle, watchdog, smoke, provider, ready
self_correction_rules: Do not use helper functions inside Start-Job scope.
Use stdout-only reporting to avoid shared file locks.
Continue cycles even when one root path is missing.
Do not print secrets, DATABASE_URL values, tokens, or passwords.
